name: sr_winback_plan_hinglish
notes: Variation on the base win-back delegation case, phrased in realistic Hinglish, proving the routing isn't keyed to a specific English template. Run: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 5 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> sr_winback_plan_hinglish.json`.

steps.message: bhai mere purane customers wapas nahi aa rahe, unko wapas laane ka ek plan bana do
assert_not_contains: got it — i'm on it and i'll update you shortly
i'm on it and i'll update you
steps.note: Hinglish win-back ask ('bring my old customers back'). Expect the same real Sales-Recovery delegation as the English phrasing — a grounded plan/approval ask, never the D1 filler, never silence.

steps.message: how many customers do I have in total?
steps.note: Pure count ask still fast-paths to the raw seeded number.
